case_title: CAFCALAS, IRENE PETERS vs. SAFEWAY, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAFCALAS, IRENE PETERS AS TO DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC. DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-25-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-1994 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-05-1994
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFEWAY, INC.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-25-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-25-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-28-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-28-1994, CONTINUED TO JAN-27-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAFCALAS, IRENE PETERS HEARING SET FOR DEC-22-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD CONTINUED FROM DEC-22-1994 TO JAN-19-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JAN-19-1995, OFF CALENDAR
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-27-1995, OFF CALENDAR
